text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now, shall we begin the meeting?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is right around the corner. We
haven't any time to spare, so—
Ho ho ho! Haaaappy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy, Grass, Grass's trainer! ♪ Havin' a good
time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume who just burst into the room is
Taiki Shuttle, an American-born student like
Grass Wonder who happens to be one of her
Miho dormmates.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: T-Taiki? What's all the commotion about?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm jus—whoa! No way... Y'all gotta be kiddin' me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm gonna need both of ya to gimme a
hand!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh? T-to do what?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Kay, Grass! You handle this tinsel! And Trainer,
you help me over here!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No no no! Put it somewhere it's gonna stand out!
It's gotta bring everything together with a nice
POP!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without the slightest idea what's happening,
Grass Wonder and I follow Taiki Shuttle's lead,
until...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... In the blink of an eye, your office has
become...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Perfect! Thank ya both kindly. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And where's your Kentucky spirit, Grass? Can't
believe you done almost forgot to deck the halls!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Um, I'm not from Kentucky...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I can't blame ya, with the Arima Kinen
comin' up and all. You're probably dyin' to show
off your skills.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But ya gotta learn to take a load off or you'll run
yourself into the ground!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Taiki...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Would ya look at that! It's about time I go hit
the slopes on my sleigh.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, let me let y'all go! Have a good night, ya
hear? ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hahaha... J-just look at this room!
choice_data_list: Can't have a serious meeting in here, can we?
Can't have a serious meeting in here, can we?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I don't think so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I decide to take advantage of
the situation and enjoy the holiday spirit.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A whole boxful of chicken... Eheheh... It's not
quite the same as an American festive dinner, but
this is special in its own way.
choice_data_list: Let's head back and eat before it gets cold!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Still, I must say, this light display is gorgeous.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Which reminds me...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
When I was little, I thought the strings of lights
were actual stars that had come down from the
sky.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They're usually way out in space, but I thought
they made a special trip to see us for the
holidays.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Getting to touch the stars was a miracle to me
every December.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I was rather young, mind you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But nowadays... I don't think I need any miracles,
no matter how distant my goal may seem.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I can climb to any height with my own two legs.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Even the stars are within my reach.
choice_data_list: And I'm certain you'll make it.
And I'm certain you'll make it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Those words are the best present I've received
this year.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll remember them... to help me when I reach out
to those stars.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Though I do have one worry... Once I reach those
heights, it may prove difficult to get back down.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll need some point of reference to guide my
descent back home—something bright enough to
see from the ends of the sky.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer... would you be that light?
choice_data_list: I'll wave as hard as I can!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! That sounds like an adorable sight.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll be looking for you, when that time comes.
